title: Audit / Failover / Routing / Billing panels
description: Audit: findings list + one-click [fix→] for cli_type/provider/orphan. Failover: cooldowns + clear. Routing: project pins. Billing: 30-day calendar.

context.text: Implemented Audit, Failover, Routing, and Billing dashboard panels with real dashboard-state collectors, redacted/masked DTOs, audit fix and cooldown-clear actions, project-pin-aware routing with explicit searchRoot pin writes, cwd-to-pin mappings, non-mutating cooldown reads, browser-origin protection for mutating endpoints, focused unit/integration/E2E coverage, and screenshot proof. Gates passed: npm test -- --runInBand (102 suites, 2458 passed, 5 skipped), npm run build via E2E, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run typecheck:dashboard, npm audit --audit-level=moderate, Swift build, git diff --check, and dashboard Playwright E2E (4 passed). Screenshot proof: ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-012-audit-failover-routing-billing-desktop.png and ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-012-audit-failover-routing-billing-mobile.png. Parallel code/security/integration reviews found issues; all were fixed. Final Codex adversarial review reported no blocking findings.
